evidence.text: How Production Data Compounds Value Most AI products stagnate after launch. The ones that dominate? They build data flywheels from day 1. Here's how we turn every user interaction into model improvements across Grey Haven portfolio companies. By Grey Haven • February 27, 2025 • 11 min read ✦ AI Engineering ✦ Data Flywheel ✦ Production AI ✦ Continuous Improvement ✦ Mlops You launch your AI product. Users love the demo. You're excited. Three months later, you're stuck. The model hasn't improved. User complaints pile up. Competitors who launched after you are somehow better. What happened? You forgot to build the flywheel.
